programme.title: Temptation Island: Blake the Fake
programme.desc: Things are heating up in the guys' villa, while their girlfriends question the singles' intentions.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Hearts

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Casey Anthony Story

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.desc: Father and son oilmen employ a twin-toed warlock to hunt for oil.

programme.desc: Two of Kentucky's biggest oil barons, go head-to-head in a winner-take-all drilling competition.

programme.desc: Arctic temperatures and a hungry grizzly wreak havoc on a struggling homestead. The Raneys leap to action with huge builds including a blacksmith shop, but tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Hill of Death
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock. Marty risks all forming a road up a bedrock cliff to a forest crawling with mountain lions.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Contamination

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Rise Above
programme.desc: An openly gay horse trainer and an anxious wilderness instructor take on the daunting jungle of Amazonia. Constant rain and a lack of resources make one survivalist hit rock bottom quickly, while the other is forced to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: No Safety in Numbers

programme.title: Naked And Afraid: Feral Fashion: Helter Swelter

programme.desc: As Traci and David prepare for a big Gypsy wedding, Traci's disapproving gorger mother threatens to wreak havoc on their special day. Gypsy Lee Ann and her gorger husband Joe butt heads when she plans to throw their young daughter Mary a coming-out party.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Reverse the Gypsy Curse
programme.desc: Brittany plans a traditional Gypsy funeral for her beloved late father, hoping to reverse a curse of bad luck that began after he was cremated. Maryann will only let her daughter Lexi marry gorger Kenny if he disowns his entire family.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Sisters Don't Marry Each Other's Husbands

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quints' Night Out

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A family faces violent attackers trying to rob their jewelry store, and two young women flee from a driver out to get them.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Tacos with Guy Episode
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drawing a Blank
programme.desc: Find out what classic bit began in this early episode, which Jokers used to live together, and why filming in Times Square became a bad idea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Starfart Macchiato
programme.desc: Find out what game the Jokers have played five times throughout the show's history, and how the crew got poison ivy. Plus, learn what game the Jokers played that had them asking for extra turns.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bathroom Break
programme.desc: Find out how many laser nipples one man can stand and who the sexy fireman who 'rescues' Sal from the bathroom of horrors really is.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Doomed
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr take in more than they bargained for while working at a tailor shop, then convince strangers to hand over their cell phones. Plus, tonight's big loser sacrifices his childhood for a punishment three months in the making.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Parks and Wreck
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes as the guys cannonball into an uncomfortable poolside encounter. Tonight's loser presents a shocking senior citizen initiative to a community planning board.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Kaptain Kourtney and Skipper Scott
programme.desc: Khloé takes her support of Scott to another level when she arranges for them to host a podcast together, but things get ugly when Scott backs out on his promise to be in French Montana's music video.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Riding Dirty
programme.desc: When Khloé rekindles her love for horseback riding, Scott and Kourtney make a secret wager on how long she will last. Meanwhile, Kourtney and Kim try to break Kris's cranky mood by cooking her up some romance.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Modern Family: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Alex's worst nightmare is realized when she gets news that she has to share the Valedictorian title with her number one competitor, Sunjay.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crying Out Loud
programme.desc: Determined to make Alex celebrate her senior ditch day, Phil, Luke and Haley forcefully take her out but end up on an unexpected detour. Claire is torn when she gets a job offer from a big hotel chain.

programme.title: Modern Family: American Skyper
programme.desc: The whole family is at Jay and Gloria's for Alex's graduation party, except for Phil. He ingeniously figures out a way to be there via Skype and a robotic vessel after being unexpectedly detained in Seattle on a business trip.

programme.title: Modern Family: Summer Lovin'
programme.desc: Haley's attempt to stop Andy from proposing to Beth ends up with both Haley and Andy needing to cope with their emotions and both have their own special ways of doing so. Phil and Claire seem to only make matters worse.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire are feeling a little snubbed by their kids when Alex intentionally gives them the wrong college move-in date to avoid making it a big deal. Meanwhile, Luke seems less than eager to spend the day with Phil at his open house.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Closet Case
programme.desc: Being the cool dad that he is, Phil helps Haley convince Claire to allow Dylan to move in temporarily, but after seeing how intimate living together means, Phil is having major second thoughts.

programme.title: Modern Family: She Crazy
programme.desc: Phil is all in on project hatch-the-duck-eggs, even building a whole habitat for them. No one else is as enthused about this project and Lily is the only one suckered into helping him.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict
programme.desc: Claire is excited to give Haley and Alex a great experience for 'Bring Your Daughter to Work Day' but the staff is not making it easy. Elsewhere, Phil takes Luke and Manny's class out for community service day.

programme.title: Modern Family: The More You Ignore Me
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have their hands full when Luke gets arrested for driving without a license, then they catch Alex sneaking out of a liquor store, but that’s on top of Phil dealing with some personal insecurities.

programme.title: Modern Family: Phil's Sexy, Sexy House
programme.desc: Everyone is at Jay and Gloria's for post-Thanksgiving leftovers brunch, and after a conversation about the sexy and sleek house that Phil is helping Mitch and Cam's friend sell, everyone gets the same bright idea to sneak in there and have a little 'fun.'

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: There's No Smoke Without Fire Island
programme.desc: Scott, consumed by his negative associations with the Hamptons, decides to leave early. Khloé and Kourtney hire a new Dash Doll as a favor to Bruce, but decide to keep her busy in other ways.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: A House Divided
programme.desc: Scott is still unable to set foot in his late parents' house, so Kourtney gets to work on fixing it up, hoping that she can convince him to keep it. Meanwhile, Kourtney gets upset when Khloé starts fraternizing with the Dash Dolls.

programme.title: Kourtney & Khloé Take the Hamptons: Best Friends With Benefits
programme.desc: When Khloé indulges in a night of drinking, Kourtney grows livid and accuses her of recklessly putting Scott's sobriety in jeopardy. Meanwhile, after Malika drunkenly kisses Khloé, Khloé begins to question what their friendship really means.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The New Normal
programme.desc: Even though things are changing for the Kardashian family in ways they never expected, they are determined to remember that family always comes first.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Somewhere Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: Kris starts dating someone after 25 years with Bruce, and no one is more critical than her daughters. Khloé ends up in hot water over a controversial Instagram post, and Kim gets a lesson in manners when she tries to recruit Kourtney for her video game.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Carfather
programme.desc: When Scott has a flurry of suspicious activity and vague business dealings, the family decides to pull back the curtain on Scott's man-of-mystery persona. Kris worries she's made a mistake with her living will; Kim stops Bruce from spending all his money.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: On the Road
programme.desc: When Khloé closes the book on her relationship with French Montana, Malika gets caught in the crossfire. Kris drags Kylie on a mother-daughter bonding trip to San Diego, and Kim speaks at a Silicon Valley tech conference.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Don't Panic!
programme.desc: Kris has had it with Scott when he brokers a Vegas nightclub appearance for her birthday, then shows up to it wasted and belligerent. Kim resorts to spy tactics to solve a theft problem at Dash New York. Kourtney poses for a nude pregnant photoshoot.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Special Delivery
programme.desc: A security breach motivates Kris to step up security. Scott goes to a Lord Disick party in Vegas while Kourtney finds out the baby could come early, and Kim and Khloé put together a last-minute baby shower.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Buggy Boo
programme.desc: The birth of child number three sends Scott spiraling, and Khloé enlists Bruce to help bring Scott back down to earth. Kylie's wish of owning a home comes true and Kim gets an unexpected treat when Kanye shoots a music video with North.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lip Service
programme.desc: The media starts prying into Kylie's beauty secrets and she realizes that she must address her new look. Also, Scott hires Kourtney as an interior designer but when the lines between work and pleasure get blurred, he worries that he has made a mistake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: About Bruce (Part One)
programme.desc: Bruce and the family share their raw, emotional feelings and conversations about Bruce's decision to live publicly as the woman he has always been on the inside, in the hopes that other families on a similar journey will know that they are not alone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: About Bruce (Part Two)
programme.desc: Bruce and the family share their raw, emotional feelings and conversations about Bruce's decision to live publicly as the woman he has always been on the inside, in the hopes that other families on a similar journey will know that they are not alone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Moon Over Montana
programme.desc: Kim tries to keep traditions alive by planning a family ski trip to Montana, but there's no mistaking that this year's vacation has different vibe. On the slopes, Khloé risks life and limb to bond with Kylie.

programme.title: Chopped: It's A Sibling Thing
programme.desc: Talented kid cooks compete with their brothers and sisters in an impressive show of cooperation in the Chopped Kitchen. The sibling teams uncover a strange pizza and some bitter greens in the appetizer basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Viewers Rule
programme.desc: The chefs gear up for difficult baskets when they find out that Chopped viewers have selected all their ingredients. A stunning but texturally challenging dessert meets a canned meat product in the appetizer basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Meat Fight: Bison!
programme.desc: This fierce battle features a trending lean, mean protein: bison. The first round sees the chefs going in distinct directions with their jelly bean and short rib appetizers. In the final round, the last two contenders take on bison for dessert with gusto.

programme.title: Chopped: Beast Feast
programme.desc: The competitors face off in a protein-packed battle, even featuring some fierce ingredients that are too big for the baskets. In a fast and loud appetizer round, the blenders are booming as the chefs try to make meaty appetizers with a creative touch.

programme.title: Chopped: Beasts and Bourbon
programme.desc: It's a match made in culinary heaven as four chefs must tame wild game meat in every round and use a different bourbon to accent and complement their dishes.

programme.title: Chopped: Cooked with Care!
programme.desc: Four compassionate nurses, who also cook, bring their TLC to the Chopped kitchen. In the entree round, the nurses must nurture a juice made from a vegetable and a prize protein. Then, a favorite hospital snack is a funny surprise in the dessert basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Healthy Rivalry
programme.desc: Four chefs are challenged to create light dishes from baskets full of nutritious surprises. In the first round, the competitors must make tasty fish dishes that include an unusual alternative carb.

programme.title: Chopped: Pesto Chango
programme.desc: The chefs must work their magic in the appetizer round using pesto sauce and chicken. Then in the entree round, a second basket of beautiful ingredients, including spirulina chips, challenges the chefs to get creative.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Mecca of the Midwest
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a decadent Midwest meal in honor of her hometown, Chicago. She starts with sausage, peppers and onion deep dish pizza and Chicago corn dog bites, and then she makes sweet and salty caramel and cheddar popcorn mix and mint truffle bars.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: A Tale of Four Lunches
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's whipping up four legendary lunches, from crowd pleasers to solo pleasures. There's spicy chuck burgers piled high with onion rings, plus a mother-daughter lunchtime collaboration of sesame tofu salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: B-Man and Me
programme.desc: Ree's spending quality time with her son, Bryce, and making him beef fajita nachos for dinner. The next day, she's getting ahead with a delicious slow cooker white chicken chili for the family's dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All in a Morning's Work
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is fixing a warming lunch. There's chunky beef chili, a real cowboy favorite amped up with two kinds of beef, and to top it, the cheesiest quesadilla makes a fabulous fixin'.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Low-Carb Party Bites
programme.desc: Irresistible sausage stuffed mushrooms and make-ahead zucchini roll ups. Baked brie a la Ree and jalapeno cheese crisps. Finally, stunning salmon and cucumber bites and the simplest Spanish marinated olives.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Taste of Tex Mex

programme.desc: A woman is released from jail and a friend helps her get back on her feet. Unknown to her, the friend, is using her as a pawn in her own sick game of revenge.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Cheerleader Coach
programme.desc: A girl joins the cheer squad and the assistant coach offers private lessons-- but she has her sights set on the girl's father, and will stop at nothing to get what she wants.

programme.title: Movie: Nightmare Best Friend
programme.desc: A woman's life is turned upside down when her former best-friend turns up at her door. After reminiscing with her friend, the true motive behind her return is revealed, and the woman is left scrambling to save herself, and her family.

programme.title: Movie: The Babysitter's Revenge
programme.desc: A teenage babysitter is recovering after a humiliating family scandal and learns the neighbourhood gossip may be to blame. In turn, she looks to exact her revenge on this girl and expose her secrets to the world.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: A Sinister Visitor
programme.desc: Two women are attacked by an evil spirit acting as a child, a mother confronts a sinister apparition standing over her baby's crib.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: Uninvited Visitors
programme.desc: A club manager feels the presence of an exotic dancer who was murdered by a serial killer, a dead barber gives massages from beyond the grave, a woman feels cold claws pawing at her face while lying in bed and more.

programme.title: My Ghost Story: Let Me Out
programme.desc: A man captures evidence of powerful poltergeists who threaten to steal the souls of his family; a woman makes contact with a dozen entities and has the stunning photos to show for it.

programme.title: Ghost Loop: Cradle to the Grave

programme.title: Ghost Loop: Dead and Breakfast
programme.desc: The spirit hunters travel to Prairie du Rocher, Illinois, where an aggressive ghost is attacking the owner and guests at a local bed and breakfast. The team discovers the tortured spirit of a young mother may be responsible for the activity.

programme.title: Ghost Loop: Sleeping in Terror
programme.desc: The spirit hunters travel to Lubbock, Texas, where a mother suffering from sleep paralysis is being targeted by a malevolent entity. They then head to Jones, Alabama, to help a woman who wakes up every night to a ghost chocking her.

programme.title: Ghost Loop: Secret Slaughter
programme.desc: A couple calls on the Spirit Hunters to investigate an aggressive ghost that's terrorizing their three-year-old son in Auburn, Washington. They're worried the activity will escalate and hurt their three young children if the vengeful spirit isn't stopped.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Gateway to Hell
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates a reported surge of demonic activity in America that is overwhelming the Catholic Church. He follows leads from Gary, Indiana, to Mineral Wells, Texas, where he steps outside his comfort zone and into an alleged portal to hell.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Cattle Mutilation Mystery
programme.desc: Paul Beban looks for answers in a 60-year-old string of unsolved cattle mutilations across the US. After finding evidence of government cover-ups and connections to UFOs, Paul heads to a remote Nebraska farm to unmask who or what is behind the phenomenon.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Tracking Bigfoot
programme.desc: Paul Beban treks deep into the woods of the Midwest looking for Bigfoot. He cuts through hoaxes, pranks and misinformation in search of groundbreaking evidence to prove the mysterious creature's existence once and for all.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Monsters of the Deep
programme.desc: Paul Beban sets out to bring the truth about sea monsters to the surface. After exposing a US Navy encounter with an unclassified creature in a Caribbean trench, Paul tracks a similar one said to be hiding in the dark depths of Vermont's Lake Champlain.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Zombie Apocalypse
programme.desc: The zombie apocalypse is one of the most depicted doomsday scenarios in popular culture. The COVID-19 pandemic hits as Paul Beban investigates, and he learns that something much worse than the walking dead may be on the horizon.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Chasing Skinwalkers
programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates evil shapeshifters from Navajo folklore known as skinwalkers. Paul tracks the mythical beasts from the heart of Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to Wisconsin, where he captures something unexplainable.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Alien Cover-Up
programme.desc: Paul Beban searches for evidence that extraterrestrials are among us. After investigating an alarming abduction case in Massachusetts, Paul unearths long-buried files that could lead to an alien cover-up all the way to the White House.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Superhuman Soldiers
programme.desc: Paul Beban exposes a top-secret US military program to develop supersoldiers with psychic powers in the 1970s. He then uses government insiders to gain access to a modern-day initiative to mix man and machine, creating the superhuman army of the future.

programme.title: Below Deck: Check Yourself!

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Canning
programme.desc: Canning is the method of a preserving and packaging food, without which civilization would never have ventured beyond the local food supply. We will explore where canning has been, where it is now and where it is going in the future.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Sugar
programme.desc: This industry came of age on the backs of slaves toiling in the Caribbean fields.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Supersized Food
programme.desc: The US has become the culture of 'big' as seen in homes, appliances, and cars. But 'big' has also affected the way Americans eat. Explore America's growing obsession with plus-sized meals.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Tea
programme.desc: It has been around for 5,000 years and more than six billion pounds are harvested a year.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: More Snackfood Tech
programme.desc: Examine the history of man's need to feed his cravings and with today's snack foods.

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Cookies

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Cheese

programme.title: Modern Marvels: Food: Ice Cream

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Ransom
programme.desc: It began with a young mom abducted at gunpoint. Her family and veteran investigators spent desperate days trying to find out where she was but they never could have guessed who had her and why.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Haunting
programme.desc: Police believed a pair of double homicides in Nebraska, five years apart, might be connected. Investigators working to solve the crimes feared the killer might strike again.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: This was a case that stayed with Josh Mankiewicz for years. After a young Army veteran disappeared, detectives uncovered a cryptic 911 call placed 11 days before she went missing, which exposed a twisted story and the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Sister's Search
programme.desc: Aasha Davis moved to Hollywood with big dreams. Her sister Lesley followed for support. Then, Lesley went missing and Aasha was desperate to find her. In a town built on deception, police came up with a high-stakes plan to smoke out their suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unraveled
programme.desc: For an agonizing four days, the fear was paralyzing. A city was under siege. Six people had been gunned down, but how were the killings linked? A retired detective connected the dots, initiating the manhunt for a man with a gun and a grudge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Mystery in Orange County
programme.desc: This was a case that stayed with Josh Mankiewicz for years. After a young Army veteran disappeared, detectives uncovered a cryptic 911 call placed 11 days before she went missing, which exposed a twisted story and the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Texas Twist
programme.desc: Named for the body of Christ, Corpus Christi sits on the Texas gulf coast. This part of the Lone Star State is largely sheltered from hurricanes. But as it turned out, not from one unnatural disaster.

programme.title: Snapped: Shanda Crain
programme.desc: When a daughter discovers her parents’ dead bodies within weeks of two other family members’ murders, investigators wonder if the family is being targeted or if it could be an inside job.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracy Fortson
programme.desc: A body encased in concrete leads to questions about a former sheriff’s deputy and her boyfriend’s ties to law enforcement.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vendetta
programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Night of the New Moon
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and her husband welcomed a baby boy, but then, their marriage crumbled. A bitter custody battle followed. Fearing for her safety, Diane turned to a man skilled in self-defense but, it turns out, someone else was in grave danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: For a day that ended so tragically, it started with roses. Nathan and Denise Leuthold had known each other since grade school. Together they built their family on faith, but in a flash, one of them was dead and the other was under suspicion.

programme.title: Movie: Get Out
programme.desc: A young black man is invited to his white girlfriend's family estate. When he arrives, he notices that the staff of the house are all black, and something seems off. When one warns him to get out, he finds himself trapped by the dangerous family.

programme.desc: After satellites spot an anomaly at Egypt's oldest pyramid, experts uncover a long-lost labyrinth. It could lead them to the darkest secrets of Imhotep, the mysterious high priest who built this strange complex.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space
programme.desc: When instruments on the International Space Station suddenly malfunction every time it passes over a mysterious site in the Atlantic Ocean, experts investigate if this eerie behaviours is more than just a tech glitch, but a prophecy of global doomsday.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Reconstructing Egypt's Queen
programme.desc: Historical records describe Cleopatra as one of history's most seductive beauties, but her remains have never been discovered; now, using the latest facial reconstruction technology, experts recreate the appearance of Egypt's most famous queen.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Riddle of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: The mystery behind the Holy Grail has endured for centuries as four different artifacts are claimed to be the actual historical relic; Jamie Theakston explores the secrets behind each to determine which, if any, contain miraculous healing powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Riddle of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: The mystery behind the Holy Grail has endured for centuries as four different artifacts are claimed to be the actual historical relic; Jamie Theakston explores the secrets behind each to determine which, if any, contain miraculous healing powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: War of the Ancients
programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: Super Factories: Inside the Tesla Gigafactory
programme.desc: Special access to Tesla's record-breaking Gigafactory reveals its bold ambition to build one of the most advanced cars in the world; this cutting-edge facility is one of the world's largest, representing the frontier of engineering innovation.

programme.title: Super Factories: Rolls-Royce Super Engine
programme.desc: Rolls-Royce is not only a legendary automotive brand, but also one of the largest manufacturers of aircraft engines producing the revolutionary Trent XWB, one of the world's most powerful, efficient and eco-friendly jet engines.

programme.title: Super Factories: World's Largest Steel Plant
programme.desc: The largest steel plant in the world is a hi-tech super factory that takes production to astonishing levels, turning out 21 million tons of steel every year on a sprawling campus comprised of 50 individually operating sub-factories.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Skyscraper vs. Sinkhole
programme.desc: A skyscraper sinking into the earth, the world's strongest wall in crisis, and a deadly bridge are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: NASA Under Pressure
programme.desc: When catastrophe strikes Skylab, life on earth is threatened by a space station cratering toward earth, and NASA experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong and if disaster can be averted.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hellfire USA
programme.desc: A fire in an American town burning since 1962, a massive flood that threatens Chicago's iconic skyscrapers, and a town swallowed by the sea are engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Hell Tower, NYC
programme.desc: A New York City skyscraper that could topple at any moment, a city street that suddenly collapses, and a modern-day crisis at Pisa's Leaning Tower.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Ghost Town From Hell
programme.desc: A detonated building mysteriously refuses to fall, an American ghost town with a deadly legacy, and wind turbines on the brink of disaster are engineering disasters in need of repair, and experts reveal what went wrong and if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Single mom Tracy is starting to turn her life around when she falls for attentive Jody. As his jealousy starts to overtake their relationship, she soon comes to realize she can run, but she can't hide.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Set Me Free
programme.desc: When Detectives looking for missing Mom, Tami Reay find blood in her car they arrest her husband, Brad. But then they receive a tip off, pointing the finger at an entirely new suspect.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Seeing Red
programme.desc: A series of bizarre 911 calls come in to police in two cities from a serial killer confessing his crimes. The man becomes known as the Weepy Voiced Killer, due to his strange, whining voice--and many young women will fall before he can be stopped.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Girl on the Billboard
programme.desc: After 15-year-old Jasmine Block mysteriously vanishes into thin air, her mother Sarah launches a crusade to find her before it's too late. But when the sickening truth behind Jasmine's disappearance surfaces, it leaves Sarah in shock.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Control Alt Delete
programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Final Hours of Cayley Mandadi
programme.desc: '48 Hours' provides the first in-depth look into the death of a beloved college cheerleader and the case against her boyfriend.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Violent Vendetta
programme.desc: A family feud escalates to brutal violence and John joins police in pursuit of Top Ten FBI fugitive Eugene Palmer; Callahan immerses himself in one of the most brutal cases he's ever seen as he helps authorities track down Tamera Williams.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Who Pulled the Trigger?
programme.desc: They are the victims of shootings that seem senseless, but there is no motive or suspects.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Final Hours of Cayley Mandadi
programme.desc: '48 Hours' provides the first in-depth look into the death of a beloved college cheerleader and the case against her boyfriend.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Murder Goes Live
programme.desc: When a single mother tries to move on from her open relationship, she unwittingly gets into a war of words with her boyfriend's lover. As the online insults begin to escalate, he takes matters into his own hands with devastating. consequences.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Breaking Point
programme.desc: He devoted his life to helping people and upholding the law. But somewhere along the way, he turned from savior to monster. Then, a match made in hell. And when envy is pitted against pride, it's a battle to the death.

programme.title: Deadly Sins: Deacon of Death
programme.desc: In Plant City Florida, a promising young Deacon finds love, happiness, and virtue in his high school sweetheart, but darker, bloodier impulses lay beneath the surface. Later, a sweet single mother yearns for a high, turning to porn, drugs, and murder.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Axe to Grind
programme.desc: Montgomery, Alabama's upper crust social circle is about to play host to an uninvited party guest. Murder is on the menu when one family's distrust and finger pointing lead detectives on a cross-country trek for a killer.

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Rotten to the Core
programme.desc: The heartland of Nebraska is not immune to murderous revenge. A once-happy family is frayed by anger and jealousy when an unlikely affair is revealed, and a scandalous tattoo seals the fate of more than one member of this family.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: The Last Time They Saw Her
programme.desc: When Det. Pat Postiglione finds a woman's body at a truck stop, clues suggest a serial killer. The focus shifts when suspicion falls on the victim's two drug-dealing friends.

programme.title: The Perfect Suspect: GI Gone
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes the day before she reports for Officer Training School. Her husband claims she ran off with another lover, but her family suspects something much worse. It takes 14 years for the truth to emerge...from the least likely of sources.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: Burning Secret
programme.desc: When a notorious resident reveals a grudge, police move in quickly to catch a killer in Goshen, New Hampshire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Boxes and Bloodshed
programme.desc: A hospital worker invites a colleague (who's fallen on hard times) to come live with her. But the good deed backfires, and it only takes a few weeks before a stealthy betrayal turns into a gruesome crime.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Carpool Predator
programme.desc: Mystery shrouds a San Diego exotic wildlife park when one of its valued employees goes missing. As the search for Denise Vasseur intensifies, investigators fear that the most dangerous predator at the park is not an animal.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Mother of Evil
programme.desc: For identical twins Mark and Martin Stephens, life in a family of twins has been anything but normal. But one of them is more unusual than the others. And before long, someone close will learn just how deadly a lifetime of unrealized dreams can be.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Murder Well Done
programme.desc: When 39-year-old Dawn Viens goes missing in 2009, her husband assumes she ran away to escape her problems. But the investigation will lead detectives to a most unexpected killer. They've heard of disposing of a body, but never like this...

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Area 52
programme.desc: Few have ever heard about the ultra top-secret military base in the remote deserts of Utah known as Area 52.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: A look at first-hand accounts of mysterious, unknown objects in the skies from pilots and astronauts.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Kennedy Killings
programme.desc: Conspiracy theories surrounding the assassination of Robert Kennedy, the murder of TV presenter Jill Dando and the death of government weapons inspector Dr. David Kelly are examined.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Tanks
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest tanks in history.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Fighting Forces
programme.desc: Learn about some of the greatest fighting forces in history.

programme.desc: See the shot by shot firefights in the 21 day bloody battle for Baghdad from the warrior's point of view.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Spearfish Canyon
programme.desc: Deep in the backwoods of Spearfish Canyon, South Dakota's premier off-grid builder Jared Capp sets out to turn four shipping containers into a stunning two-storey mountain hideaway.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Looks Are Deceiving
programme.desc: Jennifer and Paul wanted an older home with character and curb appeal.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Looks Are Deceiving
programme.desc: When Andrew and Melissa had a little girl, they needed to buy a house with more space in a family friendly neighbourhood. They did not expect more problems.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Getting Hosed
programme.desc: James and Doreen were thrilled to be able to afford a house for their growing family. Unfortunately the deal closed before they could read their home inspection report.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection: Moisture Madness
programme.desc: A downtown storefront property has become a home with a moisture problem.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Magical Modern Treehouse
programme.desc: Equipped with a 205 ft zipline entrance through the trees, Pete and his team work modern magic in Georgia.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: View From Above III
programme.desc: Pete and his crew gather 'round the campfire to answer questions from fans, and recall the most magnificent builds, heartwarming memories, and downright ridiculous moments they've enjoyed in the world of treehouses.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Sunrise Day Camp Clubhouse
programme.desc: Pete constructs an amazing clubhouse for Sunrise Day Camp: a summer camp for kids battling cancer. This open-air treehouse grants campers full interaction with nature by erasing the line between indoors and out.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Pittsburgh, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Pittsburgh for creative eats and a five-pound sandwich loaded with meat, cheese, fries and coleslaw.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Ozark Mountains
programme.desc: Casey travels over the Ozarks to tackle the Goliath, a massive cupcake equal to 22 regular-sized cupcakes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Giant Meat and Habanero Heat
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with a burger that originated as a late night, off-menu secret and accidentally became the talk of the town. Then, in Seattle, a beer hall serves a mammoth, pretzel-breaded, deep-fried pork shank.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Ribs, Ramen and Gooey Butter Cake
programme.desc: Brad Miller's food truck trek starts at Wood Shop BBQ in Seattle, where Chef Matt Davis serves up massive smoked beef ribs and chicken wings tossed in his special Kansas City-style barbecue sauce. Next up is the Hapa PDX truck in Portland, Ore.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pork Buns, Falafel and Snow Cones
programme.desc: Brad Miller hits the road in St. Louis, where he gets a taste of authentic Hawaiian food from Buzz's Hawaiian Grill food truck. Brad tries Chef Thomas "Buzz" Moore's signature yellow fin tuna poke bowl.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Bayside Bites
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Ali Khan comes face-to-face with bacon-infused pancakes fit for 'the king', then channels his inner Neanderthal for his first taste of Maryland pit beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations: Montana
programme.desc: Tony explores the snow-capped mountains, majestic big skies, winding rivers and roaming cattle of Livingston, Montana.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cincinnati
programme.desc: Andrew celebrates the can't-miss local favorites of Cincinnati, including pork schnitzel, goetta and Cincinnati chili.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Atlanta
programme.desc: In the modern city known for its southern hospitality, Atlanta's comfort food is king. From fried chicken and peach cobbler to soul food and sweet tea, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that keep the hungry heading south.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: A Day of Comfort Food
programme.desc: Comfort food enthusiast Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world, starting with an indulgent brioche French toast breakfast and an over-the-top sweet and savory brunch. He then grabs hot dogs and hamburgers for lunch.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked

programme.desc: Mickey and the gang compete against cheating Piston Pietro in Rome. The Happy Helpers cover for a sick friend by giving a tour of Rome to a travel critic.

programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy’s next delivery, an egg, gets mixed up with the eggs for the Annual Easter Egg Hunt! Pip braves the desert heat with Freddy to deliver a baby camel to nomad parents!

programme.desc: Donald's day of doing chores is derailed when his Uncle Manny pays him a surprise visit. Princess Olivia of Royalandia asks the Happy Helpers for help with the Royal-ympics.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Roaming Around Rome
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.desc: The Pugs are on a mission to recreate a video of a panda sneezing in China. Lollie enlists the Pugs to fetch some oranges for Ana's daily orange juice.

programme.desc: Mickey and pals teach a visitor some new tricks for his debut in Mickey's Circus.

programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school. The girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad! Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.desc: Goofy is taught how to act like a gentleman when Clarabelle asks him to go to the Dance.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and the Enchanted Egg
programme.desc: Mickey finds an egg, which soon hatches a baby dragon.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Big Surprise

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Springtime Surprise
programme.desc: Celebrating the first day of spring, Mickey and Minnie organize an egg hunt.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Mystery

programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the house with a balloon; Bluey and Bingo argue over a magic xylophone; Bluey, Coco and Snickers play a game called Shadowlands.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.desc: Danny has to deal with a threat only a few lockers down the hall.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!

programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Woo-oo!
programme.desc: Donald Duck takes Huey, Dewey and Louie to reclusive Scrooge McDuck's mansion where they uncover family secrets and stir up more adventure than they bargained for.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Impossible Summit of Mt. Neverrest!
programme.desc: Scrooge and Huey are determined to be the first to set foot atop an impossible summit, but the mountain holds a treacherous secret which had them test both their commitment and survival.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra
programme.desc: In a lost pyramid, Louie interprets a pharaoh's prophecy to his advantage, forcing Scrooge and Launchpad to convince a group of living mummies to rescue him.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Terror of the Terra-firmians
programme.desc: Huey and Webby explore an abandoned subway tunnel to prove the existence of an underground species, while Mrs. Beakley grows suspicious of Lena’s potentially corrupting influence.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: Sky Pirates...In the Sky!
programme.desc: Tired of being ignored by his family, Dewey’s search for attention goes too far when he falls in with flamboyant Don Karnage and his cutthroat gang of Singing Sky Pirates.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Trickening!
programme.desc: The kids forego their usual trick-or-treat path and instead take on the most haunted house in Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: How Santa Stole Christmas!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Jalen & Jacoby
programme.desc: Jalen Rose and David Jacoby give the people what they want, breaking down the latest in sports and pop culture as only they can.

programme.title: Highly Questionable
programme.desc: Dan Le Batard provides his questionable approach to sports, highlighting his thoughtful, irreverent and often humorous perspective on the world of professional sports.

programme.title: NBA: The Jump
programme.desc: Daily NBA discussion featuring the latest news and stories with a panel of NBA analysts and current players.

programme.desc: Ted Bundy helped prepare his own defense, but would his amateur lawyering help him beat the rap or send him to the electric chair?

programme.desc: Ted Bundy maintains his innocence. But as the clock wound down on his final death warrant, Ted Bundy made a last desperate attempt to save his own life he: began to talk.

programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.
