programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 2)

programme.desc: In a unique four-person challenge, a lion attack survivor returns to Africa to face her fears. Surrounded by lions, crocodiles and cape buffalo, the tribe of four struggles against constant threats and each other as they try to survive in a kill zone.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Amazoned Out
programme.desc: Superfans Molly and Nate are dropped deep in the Amazon rainforest, a place that's taken down the best of the best. Nate and Molly lean on lessons learned from their couches to push through torrential rain, relentless bugs, and extreme sleep deprivation.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Bahama Drama
programme.desc: In the Bahamas two fans face relentless insects and aggressive sharks during hurricane season.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: No Rain, No Gain
programme.desc: Torrential downpours hammer the survivalists as soon as they're dropped into the Georgia rainforest. Pushed by the weather, mountain lions, black bears and poisonous copperheads, the pair create a bond that leads to a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Two Tarzans, One Jane
programme.desc: When a third survivalist is added to the mix, romantic complications make surviving the Colombian jungle's poisonous dart frogs and deadly jaguars much more complicated. Feeling left out, a survivalist's emotional breakdown puts his challenge at risk.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Corn Crazy

programme.title: My Legs Won't Stop Growing

programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.desc: Kourtney tries to find a new status quo with Scott while the rest of the family worries she's give in to him too easily. Khloé thinks twice about how much she does for her sisters. Kris braces for landfall as Kim and Kanye prepare to move back in.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rites of Passage
programme.desc: When Kylie graduates from high school, Kris decides to throw an extra special party. Kim's pregnancy cravings take her half way around the world. Khloé responds to a presence in her house by getting in touch with her psychic side.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Kylie's 18th birthday gives Kris a reason to meet Caitlyn for the first time. History repeats itself as Kim takes over Kris' home in preparation for baby number two. Khloé takes steps to move forward.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lions and Tigers and Texts
programme.desc: After finally choosing to move forward with her divorce, Khloé seeks solace in Mexico City at the big cat rescue foundation, Black Jaguar White Tiger. Meanwhile, Kris complicates matters by carrying on her own separate correspondence with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Non-Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The family flies to St. Bart's to forget their troubles, but drama has a way of following them. Kourtney is distracted when she gets disturbing news about Scott and Kendall has beef with Kylie for bring her boyfriend Tyga.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Return From Paradise
programme.desc: With only a few days left in paradise, Kendall and Kylie try to sort out their differences while Kim and Khloé help Kourtney try to forget Scott and get her mojo back. When the family returns home, a visit from Scott throws them all for a loop.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Big Launch
programme.desc: When Kourtney isn't ready for a big product launch in NYC, her sisters help her get her head in the game. Meanwhile, a very pregnant Kim accidently upsets her best friend Jonathan. Kim makes sure Kylie is making the most of her newfound opportunities.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fear the Unknown
programme.desc: Knowing her family's history with cancer, Kris wants the girls to take a genetic test to know their risks, but not everyone is on board. Meanwhile Kendall struggles to find a balance in her relationship with Caitlyn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Miscommunication
programme.desc: Kris decides the family needs 'Communication Therapy,' but her plans backfire when she misses one of the sessions. Kylie is finally ready to celebrate her new home but her family's bossy ways get in the way of her plans.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family First
programme.desc: The girls recreate a legendary family video as part of Kris's epic 60th birthday bash. Meanwhile Khloé struggles to find a balance between supporting Lamar and returning to her daily life. Kendall worries that her family will get in the way of her dreams.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pizza Masters
programme.desc: Four dough throwers compete in a pizza playoff. The chefs make pizza with high-priced toppings and low-priced cheese, a guilty pleasure pizza and an 'out of the pizza box' pizza in the final round when pizza dough is suddenly out of stock.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Grocery List

programme.title: Raven's Home: The Most Interesting Mom in the World

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Last Dances and Last Chances
programme.desc: After Austin confesses to Carrie that he'd rather be at the prom with Ally, Carrie warns him that he'd better show her sister the best time ever. Trish runs back and forth between Jace and Chuck until Sun Hee takes Chuck back.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Vendetta
programme.desc: Beloved by his colleagues, Mark Hasse was a fearless prosecutor. He worked to put criminals behind bars and making enemies was a hazard of the job. He didn't know it, but a killer was lurking and Mark wasn't the only target.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Something Wicked
programme.desc: Skylar Neese was everything her parents hoped for, but their world turned upside down when she vanished without a trace. At first, police thought she ran away but hints on social media pointed to a more sinister reason for her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Last Dance
programme.desc: A beloved kindergarten teacher and mother of two finds a new lease on life after shedding hundreds of pounds. When she suddenly vanishes from her home, investigators uncover a disturbing connection.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Night of the New Moon
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and her husband welcomed a baby boy, but then, their marriage crumbled. A bitter custody battle followed. Fearing for her safety, Diane turned to a man skilled in self-defense but, it turns out, someone else was in grave danger.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: For a day that ended so tragically, it started with roses. Nathan and Denise Leuthold had known each other since grade school. Together they built their family on faith, but in a flash, one of them was dead and the other was under suspicion.

programme.title: Snapped: Lucille Duncan
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in the woods, authorities ask if he's the victim of revenge from an ex-girlfriend, her over-protective brother or her 14-year-old son.

programme.title: Snapped: Tina Williamson
programme.desc: A deadly shooting raises questions about an elderly man's business dealings and his friendship with a much younger woman.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: Secret Lives
programme.desc: This story was one of Andrea Canning's first assignments for 'Dateline,' and one she still can’t forget. When Jen Ramsaran disappeared, police searched online for clues and wondered if she escaped the real world for a fantasy world.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Stealing Paradise
programme.desc: A group of adventurous Americans thought they had found paradise. It was a tropical hideaway, the kind of place where people didn't ask a lot of questions about their neighbors, until some of those neighbors started to disappear.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Murder in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: He dreamed of being the next Steve Jobs, a young entrepreneur who wanted to change the world. But his world came crashing down one morning with four gunshots. This was a crime of passion: a fatal triangle involving a husband, a wife and a boss.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery in Mustang
programme.desc: Keith Bryan was a beloved fire chief, a pillar of his community. Then he was shot in his home, leaving police to wonder who would want to hurt the local hero? Turns out, someone was living a secret life, and it was about to be exposed.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: What happened in Cara Ryan's bedroom was a mystery. She admitted she shot her ex-husband, but investigators needed to know if it was murder or self-defense. Detectives heard several versions of the story, but for a jury, there was only one truth.

programme.title: Movie: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Legendary showman P.T. Barnum launches his iconic and legendary circus and museum, assembling a collection of performers, oddities, animals and outcasts to create the greatest show on Earth, succeeding despite countless doubters and setbacks.

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Poltergeist Hill
programme.desc: When a ghostly encounter in a cemetery is caught on camera, experts use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate if something paranormal is at play.

programme.title: Betrayed: Flirting With Death
programme.desc: Single mom Norma Rodriguez thinks she's found Prince Charming – until she's confronted by his crazy ex. On top of that, her best friend asks her to hide a deadly secret, and a co-worker reveals a shady past… all leading to her brutal murder.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Olympic Creep
programme.desc: When Olympic gold medallist Sheila Taormina agrees to help wannabe triathlete James Ludham, she doesn't know he wants more than just coaching. His dark fantasies take over her life until she has no other choice but to face him, and her fears, head on.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Growing Up Buttafuoco
programme.desc: Nearly three decades ago, then 17-year-old Amy Fisher dubbed 'Long Island Lolita' by media shot Mary Jo Buttafuoco on her front porch following an affair with her husband, Joey Buttafuoco. Jessie Buttafuoco reflects on her life after the shooting.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Growing Up Buttafuoco
programme.desc: Nearly three decades ago, then 17-year-old Amy Fisher dubbed 'Long Island Lolita' by media shot Mary Jo Buttafuoco on her front porch following an affair with her husband, Joey Buttafuoco. Jessie Buttafuoco reflects on her life after the shooting.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Growing Up Buttafuoco
programme.desc: Nearly three decades ago, then 17-year-old Amy Fisher dubbed 'Long Island Lolita' by media shot Mary Jo Buttafuoco on her front porch following an affair with her husband, Joey Buttafuoco. Jessie Buttafuoco reflects on her life after the shooting.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Growing Up Buttafuoco
programme.desc: Nearly three decades ago, then 17-year-old Amy Fisher dubbed 'Long Island Lolita' by media shot Mary Jo Buttafuoco on her front porch following an affair with her husband, Joey Buttafuoco. Jessie Buttafuoco reflects on her life after the shooting.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Two-Faced
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a San Francisco businessman is found floating in the California Aqueduct. Investigators initially suspect a family member, but without evidence, the case goes cold. It will take detectives several decades to find the real killer.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Stalker's Imagination
programme.desc: When Katerina leaves her husband, he fights back in imaginative ways to cause her pain, including getting Katerina locked up for a crime she hasn't committed. Katerina must do the unthinkable if she wants to escape forever.

programme.title: Deadly Dentists: Local Fracture
programme.desc: Dentist John Yelenic is thrilled when he meets the love of his life, Michelle. Ten years later, however, the veneer of their happy life crumbles when it's time to sign the divorce papers and police are called to the scene of a homicide.

programme.title: Deadly Dentists: Concealed Abscess
programme.desc: Dr. Glenn Engleman has been caring for his South St. Louis neighbors for decades, even though crime is increasing in the area. When several people close to him are killed, detectives soon discover there's more going on in Engleman's world than it seemed.

programme.title: Hear No Evil: The Sound of Terror
programme.desc: In 1983, the Secret Service are on the trail of a counterfeiter. In a storage unit, they find sickening audio recordings of him torturing dozens of women. Analyzing the tapes, they realize that he may be one of the most depraved serial killers in history.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: In a distressing 911 call, a woman reports someone is breaking into her home. Then the dispatcher hears a scream and a gunshot. Soon, investigators connect the case to a previous home invasion and must solve the crimes before another victim falls.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Final Lesson
programme.desc: The killer of a Santa Monica art teacher remains at large for years as police use every trick in their arsenal to finally hunt him down.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Little Girl Gone
programme.desc: In 1988, a nine year-old girl goes missing in Great Falls, Montana. Years after the case goes cold, a chance bus stop encounter breathes new life into the investigation, leading detectives to the horrifying truth behind the girl's disappearance.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Neighbors are sometimes miles apart in the tiny town of Horton, Kansas, but news travels fast when Patricia Kimmi disappears from her home. Evidence leads investigators to believe she may not be found alive. And worse, that her killer still lurks.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Whispers from the Woods
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania town is consumed with suspicion after 19-year-old Erica Miller disappears without a trace. Her mother posts flyers around town, prompting one resident to question the strange behavior of a family friend.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: When one of their own is tortured and killed, a tight circle of Chicago doctors wonder if the killer came from within.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: JonBenet: The Untold Truth
programme.desc: Six-year-old beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey is found murdered in her Boulder, Colorado home in 1996. Investigators try to unravel if she was killed in a kidnapping-gone-wrong, by a home intruder or by one of her own family.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door: House of Horror
programme.desc: The bloody murder of Beth Grosskopf leaves the town of Freedom, Pennsylvania paralyzed with fear.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends to Foes
programme.desc: It's easy to keep friends and enemies close when they're one and the same. These Deadly Women turn from 'Friends to Foes.'

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, General Robert E. Lee brings his Army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood-soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Codeman: Trigon
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat, ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Vladimir Vetrov was a top KGB spy until he betrayed his country and became a secret agent for the West. Codenamed 'Farewell' he would become America's single greatest asset in the US-Soviet spy war.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Merry Fishmas!
programme.desc: Pete heads to Dogwood Canyon, a 10,000 acre nature preserve in Missouri. Despite a tight Christmas deadline, Pete and his team create a two-story hands-on learning haven with a giant copper-topped turret that can endure thousands of visitors.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Surprise Makeover Edition
programme.desc: In this special season finale, Pete surprises two lucky winners to receive complete, top-to-bottom, $20,000 renovations of their existing treehouse.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Swiss Family Surprise
programme.desc: Pete heads to Michigan to help a husband surprise his wife with a Swiss Family Robinson inspired treehouse for their anniversary. Far more advanced than its castaway motivation, the treehouse is supported with steel beams to hold tons of modern amenities.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Double Dutch Dilemma
programme.desc: Tamara gets the opportunity to renovate a French chateau she's wanted to tackle for years. She finds that a recent renovation left the kitchen looking outdated and tacky, but she's determined to create a home full of authentic details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Trouble With Cobbles
programme.desc: Tamara continues work on a French chateau as she overhauls a large master suite covered in the tackiest wallpaper she's ever ripped out. She plans to move a bathroom to create an additional bedroom and extend a hallway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Mural of the Story
programme.desc: Tamara works on restoring a 1909 Craftsman home, ripping out the tacky additions that have stripped it of its original charm. She saves a wallpaper mural that could be the showpiece of the dining room, if she can keep it from being destroyed.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Clowning Around
programme.desc: Tamara continues with the 1909 Craftsman, transforming a small bedroom into the master bath. She saves and refurbishes French doors, vintage sinks, and a tub from the house, while adding modern elements like a sauna.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises
programme.desc: After transforming more than 150 backyards into paradise, Lucas is revisiting five of his favourite builds and families. Lucas and his team reveal their never-before-seen, most outrageous backyard creations.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Rocks of Love
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with creating a Mediterranean backyard resort with a Caribbean twist for a client's wedding anniversary. The team builds a paradise dream complete with a 30-person infinity edge spa, over 10 fire features, and his first ever outdoor gym!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland
programme.desc: Golfer J.B. Holmes says he never wants to grow up, but his wife wants relaxation. Challenged with making this two-in-one staycation a fun-filled destination, Lucas creates a sports area, blissful sun shelf and his first covered slide.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Meatloaded Makeovers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon starts with Vietnamese fusion dishes like juicy, tender shaking beef and mini shrimp-stuffed pancakes. In Colorado Springs, an Asian-inspired duck burger gets a wonton topper, and a meaty take on a classic PB and J.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: 50 Shades of Crepe
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Vancouver to sample some amazing eats, like the truly Canadian poutine stuffed burger, shrimp fried rice Balls, jerk chicken dumplings, and the Donuccino, a meal and a milkshake all in one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Piefidelity
programme.desc: Noah Cappe knows where to find amazing fresh seafood at the Delaware State Fair in Harrington.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Good, the Bacon, the Ugly
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads for the Lone Star state to eat his way through the Texas State Fair in Dallas, featuring some inventive foods like the bacon-tilla and the indulgent masterpiece of chicken fried lobster.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: Noah digs into morning meals with something for everyone, from the sinfully sweet Cinnamon Roll Waffle to the hearty and delicious Breakfast Poutine.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cheesy Dishes
programme.desc: Roger Mooking says 'Cheese' as he explores 15 of the best cheesy dishes across the U.S. The creamiest, smoothest and stringiest French, Italian, Mexican and American cheesy classics and innovations are on display.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Stack Attack
programme.desc: We're traveling far and wide in search of the foods that cast the most shade. We're on a stack attack looking for the tallest meals in town from Atlanta to Los Angeles, and we're not taking any prisoners.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Tasty Taverns
programme.desc: Grab a seat at the bar and enjoy a pint at these tasty taverns! A French-trained chef is slinging quality Mexican fare in NOLA and a tavern in Chicago is serving up big beer and bold burgers.

programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: A Tale of Two BBQs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits an old-school barbecue institution serving chopped pork in South Carolina and a popular restaurant serving Hill County barbecue classics in Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Livestock to Lemons
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets a lesson in the meat that makes Texas famous, sampling the Texas chili burger and the big Texas barbecue baked potato. Then he tries a local legend's tamale recipe before rounding off the day with strawberry waffle bombs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Renaissance to Rio Grande
programme.desc: Young squire Noah Cappe tries his hand at making the King's Court Conch fritters, decadent deep fried peanut butter and jelly brownie bites, a picquant fried green tomato BLT and the cookies and cream sandwich.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Derby Day to Down State
programme.desc: In Louisville Kentucky at the Kentucky Derby Festival, custom made pizza. Later, it's time to get a little bit country with Ozark style loaded fries, piled high with pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Funnel Cakes and Fried Fudge
programme.desc: The York Fair in Pennsylvania has been drawing crowds since 1765, and has had 250 years to perfect its carnival eats! Noah decks the halls with a taste of Christmas, goes off on the burger bomb pretzel, and enjoys a fork free chick 'n' waffle.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald and Louie trick Daisy the no-nonsense planner, so the Three Caballeros can play at a high-class party.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Rumble for Ragnarok!
programme.desc: Dewey must embrace his inner heel to beat the beloved Viking wrestling champ Jormungandr in a battle royale for the fate of the Earth.

programme.title: DuckTales: New Gods on the Block!
programme.desc: The kids try to prove themselves by auditioning to take Zeus’ place amongst the Greek gods, while Storkules interferes with Donald and Daisy’s date.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!
programme.desc: Magica De Spell is close to exacting revenge on Scrooge, so the family races against time to plan a dangerous rescue mission to save Scrooge and the city.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury

programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages, and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door, though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Party
programme.desc: Manny and Luke are in charge of babysitting Lily so that the adults can enjoy a day to themselves. Claire and Gloria have a lovely trip to the spa planned, Phil and Mitch nerd out at the movies and Jay and Cam go to a sports bar to watch the big fight.

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: Modern Family: Promposal
programme.desc: With Closet-Con right around the corner, Claire is on high alert and convinced there is a mole in the company. Meanwhile, Phil goes vigilante when he and Gloria confront Auntie Alice for stealing her hot sauce recipe.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A New York Family Affair
programme.desc: Kanye invites the entire family to NYC for his fashion show, but Khloé is torn over whether Lamar can handle such a big first appearance since his accident. Meanwhile, Kim tries to keep Scott busy in NYC, and Lamar meet Caitlyn for the first time.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers
programme.desc: After years of being Rob's number one supporter, Khloé is upset when she's the last to know that he's moving into a house of his own. Meanwhile, Kim speculates what's up with Kourtney and Corey's friendship, and Kourtney becomes an interior design diva.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All About Meme
programme.desc: The girls start to make peace with Rob's new relationship, but feelings get hurt when Rob starts making jokes on social media. Meanwhile Kris and Kim reach their breaking points as housemates and Kendall struggles with feeling left out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fake It Til You Make It
programme.desc: Kendall, Kylie and Khloé undergo a prosthetics makeover in hopes of experiencing a 'normal' day out. Meanwhile Scott is feeling insecure about his place in the family and Kris is resistant to Corey's idea of fun.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashian Curse
programme.desc: Khloé heads to Napa with Kourtney and Kris where her tough decision to move forward with her divorce is made even tougher by Kris's actions. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to rid himself of the alleged Kardashian Curse.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 1)
programme.desc: Kris orchestrates a surprise family vacation to Vail, but their nostalgic getaway hits a bump when the family learns that Rob has proposed to Blac Chyna back in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Snow You Didn't! (Part 2)
programme.desc: The family vacation in Vail continues as everyone tries to process the shocking news of Rob's engagement. Meanwhile Scott tries to prove he can behave himself for the rest of the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Oh Baby!
programme.desc: Fresh off the heels of his engagement announcement, Rob has another piece of news that will change the family forever. Meanwhile, Kylie struggles with anxiety from being in the spotlight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Iced Out
programme.desc: On a trip to Iceland for Kanye's music video shoot over Kourtney's birthday weekend, Kim finds herself spread too thin as she tries to cater to both her sister and her husband. Meanwhile, Scott debates showing up in Ireland to surprise Kourtney.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Got MILF?
programme.desc: Feeling that Kanye is constantly misunderstood and unfairly vilified, Kim struggles over whether to publicly take a stand for her husband. Kim also prepares for her sexy cameo in Fergie's 'MILF$' music video.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Day
programme.desc: The girls jet off for a once in a lifetime trip to the formerly restricted country of Cuba. Meanwhile, Kourtney butts heads with a family member and Kris starts to lose it when she can't reach her girls overseas.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Havana Good Night
programme.desc: As the Kardashian Cuban vacation continues, Kim’s commitment to her work engagements on Mother’s Day stirs up a disagreement. Meanwhile, Scott comes down with a major case of FOMO, and Kim tries to resolve the tension over Kylie’s Puma endorsement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Digital Rage
programme.desc: The drama between Rob and the family flares up again after Chyna launches an app they find questionable. Meanwhile, Scott is on a mission to prove that Kourtney's allergies are fake.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Blood, Sweat and Fears
programme.desc: When Kris sees how deeply Khloé is struggling, she urges Rob to reconnect with his sister and best friend. Meanwhile, Kourtney worries that she will give Scott mixed messages if she joins him in Vegas, and Kris pushes herself too far working out.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Love at First Fight
programme.desc: When Rob and Chyna get into an explosive fight, the girls rally behind them with hopes that they can fix their relationship. Meanwhile, the family tries to convince Khloé to break her streak of bad birthdays.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sea Shells By the Sea Shore
programme.desc: Style walks into the kitchen when Harlem's very own Marcus Samuelsson and Los Angeles' finest Michael Voltaggio arrive to conquer Mount Flay. They're counting on dim sum master Ed Harris or seafood connoisseur Jason McLeod to help get to the top.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Foreign Relations
programme.desc: The powerhouse duo of Giada De Laurentiis and Michael Symon team up once again to take down their friend Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Out On a Limb
programme.desc: NBC's Tamron Hall and 'Chopped's' Ted Allen are in the arena and Bobby is in their sights! They've brought two talented chefs to take him down. Whiz kid Katherine Humphus gets into a culinary slugfest with the no-nonsense John Wassil.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: East Coast's Finest
programme.desc: Celebrity chef and author Curtis Stone teams up with Michael Symon to rattle Bobby. Rhode Island's Chef Antonio Franco goes head-to-head against New York Chef Luke Venner for the chance to take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Beach Bites' Katie Lee and Thai chef Jet Tila arrive to take down Bobby Flay with two incredible chefs of their choosing; restauranteur Crista Luedtke and the fashionable Alan Vargas.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Ruling With an Iron Fist
programme.desc: Two of the toughest judges from Iron Chef, Simon Majumdar and Donatella Arpaia, come to Bobby's arena. These two know exactly what to look for in a contender.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Boys Are Back
programme.desc: It's new school versus old school, South Western-style, when veteran Santa Fe chef Todd Hall and Phoenix chef Brian Archibald duke it out with hopes of convincing Iron Chef Michael Symon and Chef Michael Voltaggio that they have what it takes.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Arrivals and Departures
programme.desc: Vying for a chance to compete against Bobby Flay is no small feat when Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Iron Chef judge Donatella Arpaia decide who gets the shot.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: If I Dip, You Dip, We Dip
programme.desc: Legendary funny woman Ana Gasteyer has Bobby Flay in stitches as she and Chef Josh Capon try to take Bobby down. He has to dip and dodge Ana's comedic barbs as he takes on chefs Sarah Cloyd and Danny Brown, who are looking to humor themselves with a win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Pump It Up
programme.desc: The laughs are flowing when comedian Tony Rock and jokester Alex Guarnaschelli heckle Bobby Flay in his own kitchen. Delaware chef Bill Clifton and Long Island's Stephan Bogardus compete for the last laugh.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Listless in Louisiana
programme.desc: Robert Irvine travels to Lafitte, LA, to visit Boutte's Bayou Restaurant, where owner Nick is too proud to ask for help. Robert guides Nick in becoming a real leader and trusting his staff before it's too late for the iconic coastal watering hole.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible: Mission in Paradise
programme.desc: Robert Irvine makes a feast without a kitchen for 30 people in Oahu, Hawaii. Robert and his team must battle the weather, harvest their ingredients, catch their own seafood and manage an unpredictable underground oven to pull off the impossible.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We Will, We Will Judge You
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and actor Lou Diamond Phillips bring in heavy hitters to take Bobby down. Recruited from Bobby's own ranks, former judges chef Adrienne Cheatham and chef Michele Ragussis are both ready for a win of their own.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Iron Age
programme.desc: Iron Chef meets Beat Bobby Flay when Jose Garces takes on the newest Iron Chef, Stephanie Izard. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Simon Majumdar decide whose cuisine reigns supreme.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: How You Bean?
programme.desc: Food Network's Damaris Phillips and Sunny Anderson show up to light a torch under Bobby Flay's stove and set his kitchen ablaze. Chefs Brian Lopes and Jesse Wykle go head-to-head for a chance to make waves in Bobby's kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Whiz Kids
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and kid chefs Gibson Borelli and Tyler Zager have just one homework assignment: beat Bobby Flay! They'll see to it that either California restaurateur Claud Beltran or first-time dad Brian Santos has what it takes.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Roadside Sting
programme.desc: It's opening weekend of deer season and the wardens head out around the state to ensure everyone plays by the rules. In East Texas, an injured owl is rushed to the vet. On the Gulf, Game Wardens get tough when an oysterman's catch doesn't add up.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Gator Showdown
programme.desc: The wardens are deep into deer season, investigating a suspected poacher and a felon who shouldn't be using a firearm to hunt. An alligator and her hatchlings must be captured and relocated from a school.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wild Encounters
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens relocate a large herd of pronghorn to restore populations in West Texas, investigate the killing of a protected rattlesnake, and wrangle a loose bull. Game Wardens check hunting camps to ensure no one's taking too many white-tail deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Armed and Dangerous
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens see plenty of violations at night, from road hunters to felons possessing firearms. Game Wardens stop wildlife crimes with anonymous tips about anglers keeping over the limit and a specially trained k-9 unit to sniff out illegal items.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Trouble on the Lake
programme.desc: On Lake Limestone, wardens must do a routine check on multiple boats, and a team is deployed to search for a hiding poacher. Later, a gator is found roaming a garage, while Warden Boone joins a manhunt with local police to find a group of armed suspects.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Confessions of a Poacher
programme.desc: Warden Richards confronts a suspected poacher for illegally hunting ducks and geese. Wardens Ben and Chelsea Bailey monitor an injured deer running along a busy highway, and a man is arrested after confessing to poaching a deer.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Trouble on the Lake
programme.desc: On Lake Limestone, wardens must do a routine check on multiple boats, and a team is deployed to search for a hiding poacher. Later, a gator is found roaming a garage, while Warden Boone joins a manhunt with local police to find a group of armed suspects.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Trespassers Beware
programme.desc: In Texas, a new year brings new cadets and a rookie almost gets run down. In Beaumont, Game Warden Boone investigates an armed trespasser. Game Wardens encounter a Mexican boat on U.S. waters while looking for illegal gill nets on the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Face of Danger
programme.desc: The game warden's marine team searches a foreign cargo vessel in the Gulf of Mexico. A man is suspected of poaching 15 deer out of season and the game wardens discover a large marijuana growing operation outside of Dallas.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Of Clams and Car Crashes
programme.desc: The Washington State Fish & Wildlife are trained to handle any scenario and that concept is put to the test when a three-car crash interrupts an officer interrogating suspected clam poachers.

programme.title: Northwest Law: Boats and Does
programme.desc: Washington's Fish and Wildlife officers are on the case rescuing animals on land, and helping civilians running into trouble on the waters of Moses Lake.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Tiny Watchdogs
programme.desc: Featuring Yorkshire terriers, lagotto romagnolos and German shepherds.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Darkness Comes Knocking
programme.desc: A couple that has been together for seven years are being torn apart by a cat named Darkness. Another couple moves into their dream home but their four cats turn it into a war zone.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Big Croc Diaries
programme.desc: Steve and Terri introduce their favorite crocodiles at Australia Zoo, including a close-up examination of the five biggest crocs they lunge and strike. High-speed film sequences show the tremendous power and speed of each crocodile.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: O Come All Ye Mongoose
programme.desc: Keeper hope that dwarf mongoose couple, Cooper and Mini, may deliver some new babies in time for Christmas, but it's not an easy ride.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: How 'Bout Them Apples
programme.desc: Pete trucks out to Walden, NY, to build a treehouse tasting room for Angry Orchard. The pavilion-style structure will elevate orchard-goers high above the acres of apple trees where they can enjoy a glass of hard cider and soak in views of the orchard.

programme.title: Tanked!: Howie Mandel is the Brains Behind ATM
programme.desc: Howie Mandel contacts ATM to build a tank for his production office. The comedian and television host has difficulty making up his mind so Wayde and Brett must design a tank without any guidance.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Brother's Return
programme.desc: Country Matt returns to help his brother, a new parolee, overcome his fear of dogs. Earl and Tia's daughter-in-law race to save a stray running loose in scorching temperatures. A couple of empty nesters visit VRC in search of a new friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Shelter From the Storm
programme.desc: Tia hires three new parolees, but things quickly take a turn for the worse. A rural shelter threatened with closure needs Tia's help. And a family recovering from the loss of their home and dog in a flood comes to VRC looking for a new best friend.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Game wardens enforce the law across Texas. A hunting club has a trespassing issue. People are caught attempting to illegally cross the Rio Grande. An argument between neighbors is mediated. Fishermen receive citations on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Movie: Only for One Night
programme.desc: A married man has a one-night stand with his wife's sister, who threatens to tell her.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: Notorious

programme.title: First Wives Club: Something Blue
programme.desc: Hazel and Bree go to Sag Harbor to support Ari, both in present day and in flashbacks, as they reminisce about Ari's wedding to David, and how unhappy she was even back then. As Ari considers divorce, David surprises her by asking for a vow renewal.

programme.title: Bigger: Where Do We Go From Here?

programme.title: Martin: Power to the People's Court
programme.desc: After Tommy accidentally backs into Sheneneh's car, she serves him with a court summons.

programme.desc: Cleveland takes an offer from his boss, Mr. Waterman, to quit his job with six months of severance pay, but struggles to find a way to tell Donna. Meanwhile, Rallo finds a handsome and charming man for Roberta.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Rodent Like This
programme.desc: When Donna discovers a rat loose in the house, she immediately moves herself and the kids in with her mother.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: California Dreamin' (All the Cleves Are Brown)
programme.desc: The Browns pack their bags and move to Los Angeles, where Cleveland pursues his life-long dream of becoming a major league baseball scout.

programme.title: The Parkers: Single Black Female
programme.desc: Elaine, a new friend in Nikki's life, threatens the bond between her and Andell.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kim Who?
programme.desc: When Kim rides T's scooter without a helmet, she becomes injured and loses her memory.

programme.title: The Parkers: In Sickness and in Health
programme.desc: Prof. Oglevee has surgery but doesn't get much rest when Nikki visits him in the hospital.

programme.title: The Parkers: Et Tu, Andell?
programme.desc: The gang hits a local club to help Nikki relieve some stress, but the opposite happens.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Hangover Part Tubbs
programme.desc: When Donna runs for the school board, she tries to keep an embarrassing Cleveland out of her campaign. But her efforts blow up in her face when he 'kills' a new friend playing 'The Hurt Locker' game.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Who Done Did It?
programme.desc: When Cleveland starts seeking revenge on everyone in Stoolbend, things get out of hand and he's accused of a murder he didn't commit.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Fist and the Furious
programme.desc: Cleveland feels bad for Dr. Fist because he has no friends, so he decides to make him 'one of the guys.'

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: I'm a Survivor
programme.desc: When Dre goes back to Compton for a funeral, he is reunited with his old crew and struggles with survivor's remorse for the friends he left behind. Meanwhile, Bow becomes self-conscious when Ruby criticizes her parenting style.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town, and he feels a little jealous of her close relationship with Pops. Dre and Bow urge Zoey to take Junior to a high school party, and things get out of hand.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bow's sister comes to town after filming a stint on a reality show, and they couldn't have less in common. Meanwhile, Zoey suggests that Dre spend more time with Junior since she’s leaving for college, and Jack and Diane decide to rebrand themselves.

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up
programme.desc: When Zoey gets into several colleges around the country, Dre and Bow begin to feel worried and sentimental. They reflect back on memories they've had with the family and wonder what life will be like without her around all the time.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with a fellow incoming freshman, Miriam, after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sprinkles
programme.desc: Initially wary, Dre embraces throwing Bow's baby shower and wants it to be unforgettable. However, his plans are put on hold when Bow stops by the OB/GYN with a headache and discovers she is having complications.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Movie: Transformers: The Last Knight

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter

programme.desc: Henry and Deputy Marshal Dolls put aside their differences to infiltrate a Revenant hive. Wynonna must employ all her wits to avoid becoming a serial killer’s next victim.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: No Cure for Crazy
programme.desc: The forest reveals its secrets and a clue to Nicole's past. Meanwhile, Wynonna pays an unexpected visit to her mother.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: Jolene
programme.desc: A demon causes havoc in town as Wynonna, Waverly and Jolene must decide who they can trust.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: The Other Woman
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who knows a little too much about the Earps arrives on the Homestead with a special mission for Wynonna and Waverly. The rest of the team must wrangle a deadly fire witch.

programme.title: Movie: Shut In
programme.desc: After a horrific accident kills her husband and paralyzes her son, a child psychologist takes a young boy, dealing with the loss of his mother, into her home. When he disappears in a winter storm, she confronts ghosts and deadly visions to find him.

programme.title: Movie: Hunter Killer
programme.desc: A submarine captain on a rescue mission in the Arctic Ocean discovers that the Russian president has been kidnapped and that a coup is in progress. With the world teetering on the brink of WWIII, he must navigate enemy waters to rescue the President.

programme.title: Movie: The Strangers: Prey at Night
programme.desc: While on a road trip, a family stops for the night at a trailer park that seems to be deserted, despite signs that someone has been staying in their trailer. Once night falls, three masked figures appear and begin to terrorize the innocent family.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tear Downs and I Dos
programme.desc: With their wedding just months away, this couple hopes to find and renovate their forever home with room for their growing brood of rescue dogs.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Designing Memories
programme.desc: After bouncing around from one rental disaster to the next, a couple is ready to find a first home that's as quirky as they are.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Striking the Right Chord
programme.desc: A couple with a baby is living in her dad's cramped condo while looking for a home near Nashville's Music Row.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Party on the Hill
programme.desc: After navigating a long-distance relationship, a couple finally decides to put down roots and build a home together in Brazil. Now, the two outdoorsy engineers are looking for the perfect mountain-view home where they can entertain friends and family.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Outdated Flips
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Ken and Anita are tackling a confusing 1970s split-level home, while Tarek and Christina are flipping an older southern California home that looks like it hasn't been updated or cleaned since the 60s.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sweat Equity
programme.desc: Nicole helps a newly engaged couple modernize and restore functionality to their outdated, 1970s-inspired kitchen and bathroom. To stay under budget, Nicole teaches them the meaning of sweat equity as they chip in to help the team cross the finish line.

programme.title: House Hunters: On the Rebound in Tulsa
programme.desc: After being outbid on a house they loved, a young newlywed couple is on the rebound and searching again in Tulsa. He's budget-minded and prefers a place with a clean and modern style, but she's not as frugal and likes older homes with character.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Game On in Breda
programme.desc: A family of six takes advantage of a job promotion and looks for a home in Breda, Netherlands. They're looking for a house with a large backyard that's close to schools, but she wants authentic Dutch charm while he seeks something more modern.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Place for My Daughter in Virginia
programme.desc: A buyer wants to upgrade from his small rental in Norfolk, Virginia, to a home with a room for his young daughter, and a pool table. But along on the hunt is his future roommate and best friend, who has his own priorities in mind.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bustling or Beach in Qingdao, China
programme.desc: A young couple is moving back to their collegiate stomping grounds in Qingdao, China. He wants something close to the Laoshan District, but she wants to be near the beach.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Sweat Equity
programme.desc: Nicole helps a newly engaged couple modernize and restore functionality to their outdated, 1970s-inspired kitchen and bathroom. To stay under budget, Nicole teaches them the meaning of sweat equity as they chip in to help the team cross the finish line.

programme.title: House Hunters: On the Rebound in Tulsa
programme.desc: After being outbid on a house they loved, a young newlywed couple is on the rebound and searching again in Tulsa. He's budget-minded and prefers a place with a clean and modern style, but she's not as frugal and likes older homes with character.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Game On in Breda
programme.desc: A family of six takes advantage of a job promotion and looks for a home in Breda, Netherlands. They're looking for a house with a large backyard that's close to schools, but she wants authentic Dutch charm while he seeks something more modern.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Place for My Daughter in Virginia
programme.desc: A buyer wants to upgrade from his small rental in Norfolk, Virginia, to a home with a room for his young daughter, and a pool table. But along on the hunt is his future roommate and best friend, who has his own priorities in mind.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Bustling or Beach in Qingdao, China
programme.desc: A young couple is moving back to their collegiate stomping grounds in Qingdao, China. He wants something close to the Laoshan District, but she wants to be near the beach.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Outdated Flips
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Ken and Anita are tackling a confusing 1970s split-level home, while Tarek and Christina are flipping an older southern California home that looks like it hasn't been updated or cleaned since the 60s.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Foundational Flips
programme.desc: In Fort Worth, Texas, Andy and Ashley work on a big, corner-lot house with some cracks that hint at serious structural damage. Meanwhile, Jon and Mary deal with major foundation issues while flipping a home in one of Houston's hottest neighborhoods.

programme.title: Flipping Across America: Cramped Cottage Flips

programme.title: Good Bones: Small House, Big Problems

programme.title: Good Bones: Saddest Home on Sanders Street
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a crumbling house in the Bates-Hendricks neighbourhood, only to find out it's the first house they can't save. With a clean slate, Mina designs a white beauty with new buyers in mind.

programme.title: Good Bones: New House, Old Spirit
programme.desc: Mina and Karen venture just east of downtown Indy to take on a two-storey, worn-down home that's as risky as it is disgusting. The house has almost no sustainable foundation, so the ladies try to rebuild from the ground up while adding features.

programme.title: Good Bones: Tiny Condo, Giant Upgrade
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a building with multiple condos, and to test the market, they're starting with a smaller unit on the ground floor.

programme.title: Good Bones: Free House, Expensive Reno

programme.title: Good Bones: The Gloriously Glam Home

programme.title: Jessie: Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation
